title: Morning English Practice
prompt: Practice speaking common morning English phrases aloud.
hint: Repeat each sentence clearly to improve your morning conversation skills.
sample: I always make coffee in the morning. I can't start my day without it.

ja.prompt: 朝の英語のフレーズを声に出して練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 朝の会話力を上げるために、はっきりと各文を繰り返してください。
ja.sample: 私はいつも朝にコーヒーを作ります。コーヒーなしでは一日を始められません。

zh.prompt: 大聲練習常用的早晨英語句子。
zh.hint: 清晰地重複每句話，提升你的早晨會話能力。
zh.sample: 我總是在早上煮咖啡。沒有它我無法開始一天。

title: Ordering Food at a Cafe
prompt: Practice ordering food and asking for the bill in English.
hint: Use polite phrases like 'I'll have' when ordering and 'Could we get the bill, please?' when paying.
sample: I'll have the chicken sandwich and a glass of water, please. Could we get the bill, please?

ja.prompt: カフェでの注文やお会計を英語で練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 注文時は「I'll have」、支払い時は「Could we get the bill, please?」などの丁寧な表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I'll have the chicken sandwich and a glass of water, please. Could we get the bill, please?

zh.prompt: 練習用英語點餐及結帳。
zh.hint: 點餐時使用「I'll have」，結帳時說「Could we get the bill, please?」等禮貌用語。
zh.sample: I'll have the chicken sandwich and a glass of water, please. Could we get the bill, please?

title: Professional English at Work
prompt: Practice useful English phrases for work and online meetings.
hint: Repeat phrases like 'I'll send it right away' and 'Could you repeat that?' to sound professional.
sample: I'll send it right away. Could you repeat that? Let me get back to you on that.

ja.prompt: 仕事やオンライン会議で使う英語のフレーズを練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 「I'll send it right away」や「Could you repeat that?」などのフレーズを繰り返して、プロフェッショナルに話しましょう。
ja.sample: I'll send it right away. Could you repeat that? Let me get back to you on that.

zh.prompt: 練習工作及線上會議常用英語句子。
zh.hint: 重複「I'll send it right away」、「Could you repeat that?」等句子，讓你聽起來更專業。
zh.sample: I'll send it right away. Could you repeat that? Let me get back to you on that.

title: Evening English Phrases
prompt: Practice common English phrases used in the evening at home.
hint: Say sentences like 'I'm going to call it a night' to express ending your day.
sample: I'm going to call it a night. Sleep well, sweet dreams.

ja.prompt: 夜の家で使う英語のフレーズを練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 「I'm going to call it a night」など、一日の終わりを表す文を言ってみましょう。
ja.sample: I'm going to call it a night. Sleep well, sweet dreams.

zh.prompt: 練習晚上在家常用的英語句子。
zh.hint: 說像是「I'm going to call it a night」這樣表達結束一天的句子。
zh.sample: I'm going to call it a night. Sleep well, sweet dreams.

title: Full Day English Review
prompt: Review and practice English phrases for morning, cafe, work, and evening.
hint: Repeat all key phrases from each part of the day to improve fluency.
sample: I'm running late. I'll have the chicken sandwich, please. I'll send it right away. I'm going to call it a night.

ja.prompt: 朝、カフェ、仕事、夜の英語フレーズを復習して練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 一日の各シーンの重要なフレーズを繰り返して、流暢さを高めましょう。
ja.sample: I'm running late. I'll have the chicken sandwich, please. I'll send it right away. I'm going to call it a night.

zh.prompt: 複習並練習早晨、咖啡廳、工作及晚上的英語句子。
zh.hint: 重複一天中各時段的重要句子，提升流利度。
zh.sample: I'm running late. I'll have the chicken sandwich, please. I'll send it right away. I'm going to call it a night.
